title: Best JBL Audio Gear for Easy Home Upgrades
bodyHtml:
Upgrade Your Home Audio with JBL’s Modern Audio Solutions

JBL's new Modern Audio (MA) AV Receivers and Stage 2 Loudspeakers offer an excellent solution for audiophiles who desire superior sound quality without the need for an extensive setup.

‍

Simplified Audio Excellence

JBL has crafted the MA AV Receivers and Stage 2 Loudspeakers to blend effortlessly into modern home interiors while ensuring simplicity in installation and operation. This turnkey system eliminates the guesswork involved in matching components, giving you peace of mind with a setup designed to work harmoniously.

‍

‍

Easy Setup and Upgrades

The intuitive EZ Set EQ mobile app allows for quick and accurate calibration of your system to suit your room's acoustics. Additionally, the Wi-Fi-enabled AVRs integrate with SmartThings, facilitating automated routines for a seamless audio experience. Whether you’re streaming music via Apple AirPlay, Chromecast, Bluetooth, or Spotify, JBL's system ensures smooth connectivity and control.

‍

‍

Scalable to Your Needs

Whether you’re upgrading from a basic setup or building a high-end home theater, JBL’s range of receivers and speakers can be scaled to meet your needs. Each model is optimized to deliver high performance both individually and as part of a system, so you won’t have to compromise on sound quality.

‍

‍

Product Line-Up

JBL MA AV Receivers:

  • MA310: 60W, 5.2-channel, 4K support.
  • MA510: 75W, 5.2-channel, 8K support.
  • MA710 / MA7100HP: 110W / 125W, 7.2-channel, 8K, High Performance.
  • MA9100HP: 140W, available in 5.1, 7.1, or 9.1 channels with Dolby Audio and DTS support.

‍

JBL Stage 2 Loudspeakers:

  • Floorstanding Models: 260F and 280F.
  • Bookshelf Models: 240B and 250B, with optional stands.
  • Center Channel Speaker: 245C.
  • Dolby Atmos Height Module: 240H.
  • Subwoofers: 200P and 220P.

‍

‍

‍

‍

‍

Why Choose JBL?

Opting for JBL's Modern Audio systems means investing in a brand synonymous with quality and innovation. The easy-to-use, scalable solutions are perfect for homeowners looking to elevate their listening experience without needing to fill their space with bulky equipment or dive deep into complex setups.

For more details on these products and to see how they can transform your home audio experience, visit Harman Luxury Audio.

‍

Ready to upgrade your home audio? Contact us at AVIR to help you design and install the perfect JBL system for your needs.
